docket_entries.description: POSSIBLE SETTLEMENT. IF NO PROBLEMS W/ PAYMENT, NO APPEARANCES NECESSARY ON 12/5/00 AT 1:30PM & COURT WILL CON'T FOR ADDITIONAL 30 DAYS FOR FINAL PAYMT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HELP-U-COM LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROVERSO, SACHIKO $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00, STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SIGNED BY THE COMMISSIONER. (SIGNED STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND ORDER ENCLOSED) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY HELP-U-COM LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ROVERSO, SACHIKO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-27-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-27-2000, OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-29-2000, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-05-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-05-2000, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-09-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 POSSIBLE SETTLEMENT. IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS WITH THE PAYMENT, NO APPEARANCES ARE NECESSARY ON 1/9/1 AT 1:30PM COURT WILL DISMISS ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ROVERSO, SACHIKO
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-29-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-09-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-06-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 IF THERE ARE NO APPEARANCES ON 2/6/01 AT 1:30 PM, THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE.
REM: DECLARATION RE STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND ORDER REC'D IN COURT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ROVERSO, SACHIKO
